title: Metroply
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/metroply/353622883 Metroply is one of the largest wood-based panel manufacturers in Thailand and Southeast Asia, boasting over 70 years of industry experience. The company specializes in producing a comprehensive range of engineered wood products, including particle board, MDF, plywood, hardboard, and doors. Utilizing reliable automated technology, Metroply is recognized as a regional leader in delivering world-class quality wood substitutes and building materials
